steps.name: Map Auth & Security Entries
steps.description: Locate files that contain authentication middleware, tokens, encryption, or permissions.

steps.name: Scan Code Vulnerabilities
steps.description: Analyze JWT verification, credentials leaks, bare exceptions, and sanitization issues.

steps.name: Draft Security Fixes
steps.description: Propose security refactoring modifications to correct vulnerabilities.

steps.name: Compile Security Audit Report
steps.description: Summarize security findings, scores, and improvements.

rationale: Executing predefined 'Security Audit' template agent chain.
